title: USD/JPY
text: BoJ intervention risk elevated as USD/JPY tests 158.00 resistance, with USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break signaling JPY has lost safe-haven function

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD trading above 1.1700, driven by ECB hawkish stance and US-Iran ceasefire, with EUR/USD vs EuroStoxx correlation break indicating regime shift

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD testing 0.7100 resistance, with extreme retail short bias (89% short) and AUD/USD vs US 10Y yield correlation, watch for potential squeeze

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 20.9 signals elevated volatility — not a risk-on environment, with MOVE Index at 83.1 indicating bond market stress

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net short positioning at -38,698, with CFTC speculative positioning indicating institutional bearishness, while retail sentiment shows strong short bias
